name: @narumitw/pi-worktree
description: Pi extension for safe interactive Git worktree management and workspace switching.

scripts.check: biome check --vcs-use-ignore-file=false src test package.json README.md tsconfig.json && npm run typecheck
scripts.format: biome check --write --vcs-use-ignore-file=false src test package.json README.md tsconfig.json
